zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Verch Jenkin Fleming於1365年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根利時，她的父親Jenkin Fleming21歲，母親Alice Rayne17歲。她於1406年與Mathew ap Ieuan Mathew在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1411年在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根爾其享年47歲，埋葬在法國皮卡迪索姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet Verch Jenkin Fleming于1365年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根利时，她的父亲Jenkin Fleming21岁，母亲Alice Rayne17岁。她于1406年与Mathew ap Ieuan Mathew在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1411年在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根爾其享年47岁，埋葬在法国皮卡迪索姆。

nameMeanings.name: Fleming
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, from Middle English fleming. The word reflects a Norman French form of Old French flamanc ‘Fleming’, from the stem flam- + the ancient Germanic suffix -ing. In the Middle Ages there was considerable commercial intercourse between England and the Netherlands, particularly in the wool trade, and many Flemish weavers and dyers settled in England. This surname is also common in south and east Scotland and in Ireland, where it is sometimes found in the Gaelicized form Pléamonn.
German: variant of   Flemming  , cognate with 1 above.

variants.name: Flemings
meanings: Americanized form of Flemish Vleminckx: patronymic from Vleminck, an ethnic name for someone from Flanders, Middle Dutch vleminc.

variants.name: Flanders
meanings: English: ethnic name from Middle English Fla(u)ndres ‘Flanders’, denoting someone from Flanders, a historical region covering parts of modern-day Belgium, France, and the Netherlands. Compare Fleming .

variants.name: Flemming
meanings: German: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, Middle High German vlaeminc. People from Flanders spread throughout Germany, as well as England, in the Middle Ages as clothmakers and dyers.

variants.name: Flamenco
meanings: Spanish: ethnic name from flamenco ‘Fleming, Flemish person’ (see Fleming ).

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Jenkin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is derived from the medieval given name Jankin. This was a pet form of the boy's name Jan , with the diminutive suffix -kin. The modern given name is popular in Wales, where the surnames Jenkin and Jenkins are common.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Verch Jenkin Fleming was born in 1365, in Penllyn, Glamorgan, Wales, her father, Jenkin Fleming, was 21 and her mother, Alice Rayne, was 17. She married Mathew ap Ieuan Mathew in 1406, in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1411, in Pentyrch, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 47, and was buried in Somme, Picardie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet Verch Jenkin Fleming est née en 1365, à Penllyn, Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Jenkin Fleming, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Alice Rayne, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Mathew ap Ieuan Mathew en 1406, à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1411, à Pentyrch, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterrée à Somme, Picardie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet Verch Jenkin Fleming 1365 in Penllyn, Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jenkin Fleming 21 und ihre Mutter Alice Rayne 17. Sie hat 1406 in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom Mathew ap Ieuan Mathew geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1411 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Pentyrch, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Verch Jenkin Fleming è nata il nel 1365 nel Penllyn, Glamorgan, Galles, sua padre, Jenkin Fleming, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Alice Rayne, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Mathew ap Ieuan Mathew nel 1406, nel Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1411, nel Pentyrch, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolta a Somme, Picardie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Verch Jenkin Flemingが1365年にウェールズグラモーガンペンリンで生まれた時，父Jenkin Flemingは21歳，母Alice Rayneは17歳であった。1406年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンでMathew ap Ieuan Mathewと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1411年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンペントイルチで47歳で死去し，フランスピカーディソンメにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Verch Jenkin Fleming(이)가 1365년 웨일스 글램르건 펜린에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jenkin Fleming(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Rayne(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1406년 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 Mathew ap Ieuan Mathew(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1411년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 펜티르치에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 피카디 솜에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Verch Jenkin Fleming nasceu em 1365, em Penllyn, Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Jenkin Fleming, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Alice Rayne, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Mathew ap Ieuan Mathew em 1406, em Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1411, em Pentyrch, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, com 47 anos, e foi sepultada em Somme, Picardie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Verch Jenkin Fleming родилась в 1365 г. в местности пенллин, глэморган, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Jenkin Fleming было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Rayne, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Mathew ap Ieuan Mathew в 1406 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1411 г. в местности пентирч, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет и была похоронена в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Janet Verch Jenkin Fleming nació en 1365, en Penllyn, Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, Jenkin Fleming, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Alice Rayne, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Mathew ap Ieuan Mathew en 1406, en Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1411, en Pentyrch, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultada en Somme, Picardie, Francia.
